failure_patterns.description: WebSocket connection failures in AviDMService due to configuration mismatches

user_visible: Connection status shows 'offline' despite backend being up
Agent responses never appear in chat
technical: CORS preflight failures for WebSocket upgrade

root_causes: Hardcoded WebSocket URLs in AviDMService constructor
Missing error boundary for WebSocket connection failures
No retry logic for failed WebSocket connections
CORS configuration mismatch between client and server
detection_criteria: User feedback contains 'messages not sending' keywords

implementation_order: Add proper error boundaries and retry logic

failure_patterns.description: Race conditions in message state updates causing UI inconsistencies

user_visible: Message status indicators show wrong state
technical: Multiple setState calls in rapid succession
Async operations modifying state after component unmount
Concurrent updates to messages array without proper serialization

root_causes: handleSendMessage doesn't properly serialize async operations
loadConversation can be called multiple times concurrently
No cleanup in useEffect hooks for async operations
detection_criteria: Same message ID appears multiple times in state
Console warnings about setState after unmount

implementation_order: Add proper cleanup in useEffect hooks
Implement message queue for sequential processing
Add optimistic UI updates with rollback

failure_patterns.description: Memory leaks in chat interface due to improper cleanup of event listeners and refs

user_visible: Browser becomes sluggish after extended chat use
Occasional browser crashes during long sessions
technical: Event listeners not removed on component unmount
Image blob URLs not revoked after use
WebSocket event handlers accumulating over time

root_causes: useImageUpload hook doesn't clean up blob URLs
Global error event listeners not removed in cleanup
Message ref callbacks retain references after unmount
WebSocket event handlers added multiple times without cleanup
detection_criteria: Memory usage increases >50MB after 30 minutes of chat
Number of event listeners grows over time
Blob URLs remain in memory after image removal

implementation_order: Add proper cleanup in all useEffect hooks
Implement blob URL management with automatic cleanup
Add memory monitoring for long-running sessions
Test memory usage patterns in automated tests

failure_patterns.description: Insufficient error handling and user feedback for failure scenarios

user_visible: Generic error messages that don't help user understand issue
Failures result in blank screens or infinite loading
No recovery options provided to user
technical: Unhandled promise rejections in async operations
No error boundaries around critical components
HTTP errors not properly categorized and handled

root_causes: Missing error boundaries in component hierarchy
Generic catch blocks without specific error handling
Error states not properly propagated to UI
detection_criteria: Unhandled promise rejection errors in console
Components render blank when errors occur
No user feedback for network or API failures

implementation_order: Implement specific error handling for each failure mode
Add user-friendly error messages and recovery options

integration_risks.description: AviDMSection and EnhancedChatInterface share similar state management patterns but may conflict
integration_risks.mitigation: Consolidate chat state management into single pattern or ensure proper isolation

integration_risks.description: WebSocket context conflicts between AviDMService and existing WebSocketSingletonContext
integration_risks.mitigation: Integrate AviDMService with existing WebSocket singleton to prevent dual connections
